runTitle: Vercel Production QA - frontend/AI parity gate smoke

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after parity gate smoke; effective total 17.2913 USD and billed cost 0.0000.

artifacts.label: Dashboard slot label and AI sidebar service unavailable during parity gate check

pendingImprovements.title: 프론트엔드 표시 상태와 AI 분석 상태 동일 슬롯 참조 검증
pendingImprovements.note: Dashboard slot label and /api/health?service=parity matched globalSlotIndex=57 on production, but AI chat returned Service unavailable twice so tool dataSlot.slotIndex could not be verified in the same run.

notes: Verified dashboard summary rendered 'Synthetic OTel snapshot · 09:30 KST (slot 57/143)' on production after the parity slot display fix.
Verified /api/health?service=parity returned globalSlotIndex=57, slotInHour=3, hour=9, minuteOfDay=570, toleranceSlots=1, formula=Math.floor(KST_minutes_of_day / 10).
Verified server-card warning badge still opens the AI sidebar and prefills the parity check query.
Observed /api/health?service=ai => 200 and /api/ai/jobs => 201 from the browser, but the user-facing chat response still ended with 'Service unavailable' twice.
This run confirms dashboard/API parity alignment but leaves AI tool parity evidence unresolved in production.
